title: The Broken Optimization
description: A Modpack made to optimize the mod "the broken script"
body:
тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО[Official Discord Server](https://discord.gg/8SJfnHdJ76)

What is The Broken Optimization? Well The Broken Optimization is a modpack made for the mod "the broken script" that <u>optimizes it. Making it have better performance</u> as well as in newer versions that have [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) there will be no major performance issues that this modpack cannot handle and if you think this will mess up the game itself don't worry it wont

# 20k downloads!

<details>
<summary>Information</summary>

Will this mess with any features of the broken script? No this will not change any features with the broken script this will only optimize its performance

What Loader does this use? NeoForge and Forge

Where can I download The Broken Script on its own? [The Broken Script](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)

Will TBO (The Broken Optimization) come to curseforge? No TBO will not be coming to curseforge I refuse to do so.

</details>
